<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=304000085 space=MT version=1 -->
## PAGE 01482: (2026x Refresh1) Realized Resource Exchange wizard

- page_id: `304000085`
- space_key: `MT`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/MT/pages/304000085/2026x+Refresh1+Realized+Resource+Exchange+wizard
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2026-04-28T10:31:46.263+02:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Modeling Tools Documentation > (2026x Refresh1) Modeling Tools Documentation > (2026x Refresh1) UAF 1.3 modeling > (2026x Refresh1) Dialogs
- labels: ['realized-resource-interaction-wizard', 'msosa']

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

To open the **Realized****Resource Exchange** wizard

- On the diagram pane, select the relationship (e.g. Association) and on the smart manipulator toolbar, click [ATTACHMENT filename='new_resource_exchange.png'] .
- On the diagram palette, click [ATTACHMENT filename='resource_exchange.png'] and on the diagram pane, connect the needed Resources.
- In the table toolbar, click the Add New button.
- In the matrix, right-click the intersection in the matrix and select Add New Resource Exchange .

The **Realized Resource****Exchange**wizard consists of three steps:

truenone

##### Resource Exchange creation (mandatory)

This step is designed to create a new Resource Exchangeby specifying a conveyed Resource ExchangeItem, both sending and receiving Resources, and a direction of a Resource Exchange. Depending on a fact, if selected Resources are known or not, requested information differs:

- If sending and receiving Resources are unknown from the wizard invocation context, you need to specify both.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

- If sending and receiving Resources are known, they are added to a Realized Resource **Exchange** wizard automatically.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

| Box | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Exchange Kind | Shows the type of exchanged Resources:Resource Communication.Resource Movement.Resource Energy Flow.Geo Political Extent Exchange. |
| Conveyed Item | One or more Resource Exchange Items that are conveyed by the information flow from the sending Resource to receiving Resource.Exchange KindConveyed ItemGeo Political Extent ExchangeGeo Political Extent TypeResource CommunicationData ElementResource SignalResource Energy FlowNatural ResourceResource MovementSecurity EnclaveResource MitigationCapability ConfigurationSystemResource ArchitectureNatural ResourceTechnologySoftwareResource ArtifactProjectResponsibilityPersonPostOrganizationKnown Resource |
| Exchange Kind | Conveyed Item |
| Geo Political Extent Exchange | Geo Political Extent Type |
| Resource Communication | Data ElementResource Signal |
| Resource Energy Flow | Natural Resource |
| Resource Movement | Security EnclaveResource MitigationCapability ConfigurationSystemResource ArchitectureNatural ResourceTechnologySoftwareResource ArtifactProjectResponsibilityPersonPostOrganizationKnown Resource |
| Resource Exchange | Resource Exchange that specifies an information flow for specified Conveyed Items.If you select an existing Resource Exchange from the drop-down list, Conveyed Item box and Direction drop-down list will be filled with corresponding information automatically. You will be able to edit values of Conveyed Items.The direction of the information flow won’t be editable.Available if sending and receiving Resources are known from the wizard invocation context.Resource Exchange TypeSending and Receiving ResourcesCommandOrganizationPersonPostResponsibilityControlNatural ResourceOrganizational ResourceResource Artifact:Capability ConfigurationResource MitigationSecurity EnclaveSystemResource ExchangePhysical ResourceResource ArchitectureKnown Resource |
| Resource Exchange Type | Sending and Receiving Resources |
| Command | OrganizationPersonPostResponsibility |
| Control | Natural ResourceOrganizational ResourceResource Artifact:Capability ConfigurationResource MitigationSecurity EnclaveSystem |
| Resource Exchange | Physical ResourceResource ArchitectureKnown Resource |
| Sending Resource | Resource that sends the specified conveyed information.Available if a Resource is unknown from the wizard invocation context. |
| Receiving Resource | Resource that receives the specified conveyed information.Available if a Resource is unknown from the wizard invocation context. |
| Direction | Direction of the information flow.After changing the direction from the default one, the Sending Resource will be switched with the Receiving Resource. The direction of the Resource Exchange is changed accordingly.In the Direction drop-down list, you can choose the direction of flow, i.e. what type of element is the sender and what type of element is the receiver. The drop-down list is not applicable, if the source and target is the same element and direction could not be specified. |
| Add Resource Exchange to corresponding relationships | Select the check box if you want to add the Resource Exchange to the corresponding relationships with the same sending and receiving Resources at their ends as defined in the first step of the wizard. |

##### Producing and Consuming Functions editing

This step is designed to review Producing and Consuming Functions for the created or selected Resource Exchange. ResourceExchanges are produced and consumed by Activities performed by the Resource. You can remove the realization between listed Service Function pairs.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

##### Affected diagram reviewing and updating

In this step, you can see the list of diagrams where the selected Resource Exchange can be realized and displayed.You can choose one or more diagrams you want the specified exchange to be displayed. If the diagrams are grayed out, this means there are no Conveyed Items of the selected Resource Exchange to be displayed.

The [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Setting project options' space='']**Show Item Flows on Affected Diagrams** controls how the diagrams will be updated for newly created or modified exchanges. Set the option to true to update all affected diagrams and show the Conveyed Items of Resource Exchanges whenever a new exchange is created or an existing one is modified.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

To learn more about previewing affected diagrams, see [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Preview Affected Diagrams dialog in UAF' space=''].

**Related procedures**

- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Working with Resources Connectivity diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Working with Resources Internal Connectivity diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Working with Resources Connectivity Table' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Working with Resources Connectivity matrix' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Working with Resources Constraints Definition diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Working with Resources Processes Flow diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Working with Resources Sequences diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Creating Resource Exchange in P1 diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Creating Resource Exchange in P2i diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Creating Resource Exchange in P4 Resource Functions diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Creating P4 Resource Functions diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Creating Resource Exchange in P6 diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Creating Resource Exchange in SvcV-10c diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Creating Resource Exchanges in SV-1 diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Creating Resource Exchange in SV-1 Internal diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Creating Resource Exchange in SV-2 Internal diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Creating Resource Exchange in SV-2 diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Creating Resource Exchange in SV-4 Systems Functionality Flow Description diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Creating Resource Exchange in SV-10c diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Producing and Consuming Functions dialog' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Resource Exchange Manager dialog' space='']

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

````html
<ac:layout><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><p>To open the <span class="confluence-link"><strong>Realized </strong><strong>Resource Exchange</strong> wizard</span></p><hr /><ul><li>On the diagram pane, select the relationship (e.g. <span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);">Association)</span> and on the smart manipulator toolbar, click <ac:image ac:title="New Resource Exchange" ac:alt="New Resource Exchange"><ri:attachment ri:filename="new_resource_exchange.png"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Realized Resource Exchange wizard" /></ri:attachment></ac:image>.</li><li>On the diagram palette, click <ac:image ac:title="Resource Exchange" ac:alt="Resource Exchange"><ri:attachment ri:filename="resource_exchange.png"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Realized Resource Exchange wizard" /></ri:attachment></ac:image> and on the diagram pane, connect<span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);"> the needed Resources.</span></li><li>In the table toolbar, click the<strong> Add New </strong>button.</li><li>In the  matrix, right-click the intersection in the matrix and select <strong>Add New Resource <span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);">Exchange</span></strong>.</li></ul><p><br /></p><p>The <strong>Realized Resource </strong><strong>Exchange </strong>wizard consists of three steps:</p><p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="toc" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="f88aef8d-1a7b-4fda-b7a2-c72f73194f16"><ac:parameter ac:name="outline">true</ac:parameter><ac:parameter ac:name="style">none</ac:parameter></ac:structured-macro></p><h3>Resource Exchange creation (mandatory)</h3><p>This step is designed to create a new Resource <span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);">Exchange </span>by specifying a conveyed Resource <span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);">Exchange </span>Item, both sending and receiving Resources, and a direction of a Resource <span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);">Exchange. Depending on a fact, if selected Resources are known or not, requested information differs:</span></p><ul><li>If sending and receiving Resources are unknown from the wizard invocation context, you need to specify both.</li></ul><p><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="realized_resource_exchange_new_noSR.png"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Realized Resource Exchange wizard" /></ri:attachment></ac:image></p><ul><li>If sending and receiving Resources are known, they are added to a <strong>Realized Resource </strong><span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);"><strong>Exchange </strong></span>wizard automatically.</li></ul><p><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="realized_resource_exchange_new.png"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Realized Resource Exchange wizard" /></ri:attachment></ac:image></p><p class="auto-cursor-target"><br /></p><p class="auto-cursor-target"><br /></p><table class="relative-table" style="width: 85.6829%;"><colgroup class=""><col class="" style="width: 13.6398%;" /><col class="" style="width: 86.3602%;" /></colgroup><tbody class=""><tr class=""><th>Box</th><th>Description</th></tr><tr class=""><th colspan="1">Exchange Kind</th><td colspan="1"><p><span style="color: rgb(255,0,0);"> </span>Shows the type of exchanged Resources:</p><ul><li>Resource Communication.</li><li>Resource Movement.</li><li>Resource Energy Flow.</li><li>Geo Political Extent Exchange.</li></ul></td></tr><tr class=""><th>Conveyed Item</th><td><p>One or more Resource <span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);">Exchange </span>Items that are conveyed by the information flow from the sending Resource to receiving Resource.</p><table data-mce-resize="false"><tbody class=""><tr class=""><th>Exchange Kind</th><th>Conveyed Item</th></tr><tr class=""><td>Geo Political Extent Exchange</td><td><ul><li>Geo Political Extent Type</li></ul></td></tr><tr class=""><td colspan="1">Resource Communication</td><td colspan="1"><ul><li>Data Element</li><li>Resource Signal</li></ul></td></tr><tr class=""><td colspan="1">Resource Energy Flow</td><td colspan="1"><ul><li>Natural Resource</li></ul></td></tr><tr class=""><td colspan="1">Resource Movement</td><td colspan="1"><ul><li>Security Enclave</li><li>Resource Mitigation</li><li>Capability Configuration</li><li>System</li><li>Resource Architecture</li><li>Natural Resource</li><li>Technology</li><li>Software</li><li>Resource Artifact</li><li>Project</li><li>Responsibility</li><li>Person</li><li>Post</li><li>Organization</li><li>Known Resource</li></ul></td></tr></tbody></table><p class="auto-cursor-target"><br /></p></td></tr><tr class=""><th>Resource Exchange</th><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p>Resource <span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);">Exchange </span>that specifies an information flow for specified Conveyed Items.</p><p>If you select an existing Resource <span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);">Exchange </span>from the drop-down list, Conveyed Item box and Direction drop-down list will be filled with corresponding information automatically. You will be able to edit values of Conveyed Items.</p><p>The direction of the information flow won’t be editable.</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="53b7e3bc-c72c-4db3-96f4-7cfc0283caad"><ac:rich-text-body><p>Available if sending and receiving Resources are known from the wizard invocation context.</p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p class="auto-cursor-target"><br /></p><table data-mce-resize="false"><tbody class=""><tr class=""><th>Resource Exchange Type</th><th>Sending and Receiving  Resources</th></tr><tr class=""><td>Command</td><td><ul><li>Organization</li><li>Person</li><li>Post</li><li>Responsibility</li></ul></td></tr><tr class=""><td>Control</td><td><ul><li>Natural Resource</li><li>Organizational Resource</li><li>Resource Artifact:<ul><li>Capability Configuration</li><li>Resource Mitigation</li><li>Security Enclave</li><li>System</li></ul></li></ul></td></tr><tr class=""><td>Resource Exchange</td><td><ul><li>Physical Resource</li><li>Resource Architecture</li><li>Known Resource</li></ul></td></tr></tbody></table><p class="auto-cursor-target"><br /></p></div></td></tr><tr class=""><th>Sending Resource</th><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p>Resource that sends the specified conveyed information.</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="4060d829-b8dd-41cd-a13c-378b0e2fcc51"><ac:rich-text-body><p>Available if a Resource is unknown from the wizard invocation context.</p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p class="auto-cursor-target"><br /></p></div></td></tr><tr class=""><th>Receiving Resource</th><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p> Resource that receives the specified conveyed information.</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="8bc5aafa-d3f6-4eb1-83a2-6a8cf1305629"><ac:rich-text-body><p>Available if a Resource is unknown from the wizard invocation context.</p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p class="auto-cursor-target"><br /></p></div></td></tr><tr class=""><th> Direction</th><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p> Direction of the information flow.<br /><ac:image ac:title="Direction of the information flow" ac:alt="Direction of the information flow"><ri:attachment ri:filename="realized_resource_exchange_wizard_direction.png"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Realized Resource Exchange wizard" /></ri:attachment></ac:image></p><p>After changing the direction from the default one, the Sending Resource will be switched with the Receiving Resource. The direction of the Resource <span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);">Exchange is</span> changed accordingly.</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="39279679-a8b2-4d7f-b081-e4b603107ee8"><ac:rich-text-body><p>In the <strong>Direction</strong> drop-down list, you can choose the direction of flow, i.e. what type of element is the sender and what type of element is the receiver. The drop-down list is not applicable, if the source and target is the same element and direction could not be specified.</p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p class="auto-cursor-target"><br /></p></div></td></tr><tr class=""><th><p>Add Resource Exchange to corresponding relationships</p></th><td><p>Select the check box if you want to add the Resource Exchange to the corresponding relationships with the same sending and receiving Resources at their ends as defined in the first step of the wizard.</p></td></tr></tbody></table><h3><br />Producing and Consuming Functions editing</h3><p>This step is designed to review Producing and Consuming Functions for the created or selected Resource <span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);">Exchange. Resource </span><span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);">Exchanges</span> are produced and consumed by Activities performed by the Resource. <span style="color: rgb(62,63,64);">You can remove the realization between listed Service Function pairs.</span></p><p><ac:image ac:title="Specifying Producing and Consuming Functions in Realized Resource Exchange wizard" ac:alt="Specifying Producing and Consuming Functions in Realized Resource Exchange wizard"><ri:attachment ri:filename="realized_resource_exchange_wizard_step2.png"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Realized Resource Exchange wizard" /></ri:attachment></ac:image></p><h3>Affected diagram reviewing and updating</h3><p><span style="color: rgb(62,63,64);">In this step, you can see the list of diagrams where the selected Resource Exchange can be realized and displayed. </span><span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;">You can choose one or more diagrams you want the specified exchange to be displayed. If the diagrams are grayed out, this means there are no Conveyed Items of the selected Resource Exchange to be displayed. </span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="24f81a89-6afa-40e8-9b18-a517ab8132b3"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color: rgb(23,43,77);">The <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Setting project options" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Project option]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link><strong> Show Item Flows on Affected Diagrams</strong> controls how the diagrams will be updated for newly created or modified exchanges. Set the option to true to update all affected diagrams and show the Conveyed Items of Resource Exchanges whenever a new exchange is created or an existing one is modified.</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><span style="color: rgb(62,63,64);"><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="realized_resource_exchange_wizard_III.png"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Realized Resource Exchange wizard" /></ri:attachment></ac:image></span></p><p><br /></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="f8618a39-c3c2-4266-a035-571ad94ca213"><ac:rich-text-body><p>To learn more about previewing affected diagrams, see <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Preview Affected Diagrams dialog in UAF" /></ac:link>.</p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p class="auto-cursor-target"><br /></p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><p><br /></p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><p><strong>Related <!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=304000074 space=MT version=1 -->
## PAGE 01483: (2026x Refresh1) Realized Service Exchange wizard

- page_id: `304000074`
- space_key: `MT`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/MT/pages/304000074/2026x+Refresh1+Realized+Service+Exchange+wizard
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2026-04-28T10:31:44.991+02:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Modeling Tools Documentation > (2026x Refresh1) Modeling Tools Documentation > (2026x Refresh1) UAF 1.3 modeling > (2026x Refresh1) Dialogs
- labels: ['realized-service-interaction-wizard', 'msosa']

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

To open the **Realized** **Service Exchange** wizard

- Do one of the following: - On the diagram pane, select the Service Association and on the smart manipulator toolbar, click [ATTACHMENT filename='new_resource_exchange.png'] . - Click [ATTACHMENT filename='service_exchange_button.png'] and on the diagram pane, connect Services.

The **Realized Service** **Exchange**wizard consists of three steps:

truenone

##### Service Exchange creation (mandatory)

This step is designed to create a new Service Exchangeby specifying a conveyed Service ExchangeItem, both sending and receiving Services, and a direction of a Service Exchange. Depending on a fact, if selected Services are known or not, requested information differs:

- If sending and receiving Services are unknown from the wizard invocation context, you need to specify both. [ATTACHMENT filename='realized_service_exchange_unknown_services_step_I.png']
- If sending and receiving Services are known , they are added to a Realized Service **Exchange** wizard automatically. [ATTACHMENT filename='realized_service_exchange_known_services_step_I.png']

| Box | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Exchange Kind | Shows the type of exchanged items:Information ExchangeConfiguration ExchangeEnergy ExchangeMateriel ExchangeOrganizational Exchange |
| Conveyed Item | One or more Service Exchange Items to be conveyed by the information flow from the sending Service to receiving Service.Exchange KindConveyed ItemInformation ExchangeService SignalOperational InformationConfiguration ExchangeResource ArchitectureEnergy ExchangeNatural ResourceMateriel ExchangeResource ArtifactOrganizational ExchangeOrganizational Resources |
| Exchange Kind | Conveyed Item |
| Information Exchange | Service SignalOperational Information |
| Configuration Exchange | Resource Architecture |
| Energy Exchange | Natural Resource |
| Materiel Exchange | Resource Artifact |
| Organizational Exchange | Organizational Resources |
| Service Exchange | Service Exchange that specifies an information flow for specified Conveyed Items.If you select an existing Service Exchange from the drop-down list, Conveyed Item box and Direction drop-down list will be filled with corresponding information automatically. You will be able to edit the values of Conveyed Items.The direction of the information flow won’t be editable.Available, if sending and receiving Services are known from the wizard invocation context. |
| Sending Service | Service that sends the specified conveyed information.Available, if a Service is unknown from the wizard invocation context. |
| Receiving Service | Service that receives the specified conveyed information.Available, if a Service is unknown from the wizard invocation context. |
| Direction | The direction of the information flow.After changing the direction from the default one, the Sending Service will be switched with the Receiving Service. The direction of the Service Exchange is changed accordingly.In the Direction drop-down list, you can choose the direction of flow, i.e. what type of element is the sender and what type of element is the receiver. The drop-down list is not applicable if the source and target are the same element and the direction cannot be specified. |
| Add Service Exchange to corresponding relationships | Select the check box if you want to add the Service Exchange to the corresponding relationships with the same sending and receiving Services at their ends as defined in the first step of the wizard. |

##### Producing and Consuming Service Functions editing

This step is designed to review Producing and Consuming Service Functions for the created or selected Service Exchange. Service Exchanges are produced and consumed by Service Functions performed by the Services. You can remove the realization between listed Service Function pairs.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

##### Affected diagram reviewing and updating

In this step, you can see the list of diagrams where the selected Service Exchange can be realized and displayed. You can choose one or more diagrams you want the specified exchange to be displayed. If the diagrams are grayed out, this means there are no Conveyed Items of the selected Service Exchange to be displayed.

The [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Setting project options' space=''] **Show Item Flows on Affected Diagrams** controls how the diagrams will be updated for newly created or modified exchanges. Set the option to true to update all affected diagrams and show the Conveyed Items of Service Exchanges whenever a new exchange is created or an existing one is modified.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

To learn more about previewing affected diagrams, see [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Preview Affected Diagrams dialog in UAF' space=''].

**Related pages**

- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Working with Services Connectivity diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Working with Services Internal Connectivity diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Working with Services Connectivity table' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Working with Services Connectivity matrix' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Working with Service Sequences diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Service Exchange Manager dialog' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) SvcV-6 Services Resource Flow Matrix' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Creating Resource Exchange in SvcV-10c diagram' space='']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) S2 Service Internal Structure' space='']

The direction of the Service <span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);">Exchange </span>is changed accordingly.</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="39279679-a8b2-4d7f-b081-e4b603107ee8"><ac:rich-text-body><p>In the <strong>Direction</strong> drop-down list, you can choose the direction of flow, i.e. what type of element is the sender and what type of element is the receiver. The drop-down list is not applicable if the source and target are the same element and the direction cannot be specified.</p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p class="auto-cursor-target"><br /></p></div></td></tr><tr><th><p>Add Service Exchange to corresponding relationships</p></th><td><p>Select the check box if you want to add the Service Exchange to the corresponding relationships with the same sending and receiving Services at their ends as defined in the first step of the wizard.</p></td></tr></tbody></table><h3><br />Producing and Consuming Service Functions editing</h3><p>This step is designed to review Producing and Consuming Service Functions for the created or selected Service <span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);">Exchange. Service </span> <span style="color: rgb(51,51,51);">Exchanges</span> are produced and consumed by Service Functions performed by the Services. <span style="color: rgb(62,63,64);">You can remove the realization between listed Service Function pairs.</span></p><p><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="realized_service_exchange_step_II.png"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Realized Service Exchange wizard" /></ri:attachment></ac:image></p><h3>Affected diagram reviewing and updating</h3><p><span style="color: rgb(62,63,64);">In this step, you can see the list of diagrams where the selected Service Exchange can be realized and displayed. </span> <span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;">You can choose one or more diagrams you want the specified exchange to be displayed. If the diagrams are grayed out, this means there are no Conveyed Items of the selected Service Exchange to be displayed. </span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="24f81a89-6afa-40e8-9b18-a517ab8132b3"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color: rgb(23,43,77);">The <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Setting project options" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Project option]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link> <strong> Show Item Flows on Affected Diagrams</strong> controls how the diagrams will be updated for newly created or modified exchanges. Set the option to true to update all affected diagrams and show the Conveyed Items of Service Exchanges whenever a new exchange is created or an existing one is modified.</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="realized_service_exchange_wizard_III.png"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Realized Service Exchange wizard" /></ri:attachment></ac:image></p><p><br /></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="f8618a39-c3c2-4266-a035-571ad94ca213"><ac:rich-text-body><p>To learn more about previewing affected diagrams, see <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Preview Affected Diagrams dialog in UAF" /></ac:link>.</p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p class="auto-cursor-target"><br /></p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><p><br /></p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><p><strong>Related pages</strong></p><ul><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Working with Services Connectivity diagram" /></ac:link></li><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Working with Services Internal Connectivity diagram" /></ac:link></li><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Working with Services Connectivity table" /></ac:link></li><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Working with Services Connectivity matrix" /></ac:link></li><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Working with Service Sequences diagram" /></ac:link></li><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Service Exchange Manager dialog" /></ac:link></li><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) SvcV-6 Services Resource Flow Matrix" /></ac:link></li><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) Creating Resource Exchange in SvcV-10c diagram" /></ac:link></li><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x Refresh1) S2 Service Internal Structure" /></ac:link></li></ul></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section></ac:layout>
````

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=303998501 space=MT version=1 -->
## PAGE 01484: (2026x Refresh1) Realized Strategic Exchange wizard

- page_id: `303998501`
- space_key: `MT`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/MT/pages/303998501/2026x+Refresh1+Realized+Strategic+Exchange+wizard
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2026-04-28T10:29:41.708+02:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Modeling Tools Documentation > (2026x Refresh1) Modeling Tools Documentation > (2026x Refresh1) UAF 1.3 modeling > (2026x Refresh1) Dialogs
- labels: ['realized-service-interaction-wizard', 'msosa']

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

To open the **Realized** **Strategic Exchange** wizard

- Do one of the following: - On the diagram pane, select the Actual Enterprise Phase and on the smart manipulator toolbar, click [ATTACHMENT filename='strategic_exchange_button.png'] . - Click [ATTACHMENT filename='strategic_exchange_button_pallete.png'] and on the diagram pane, connect Actual Enterprise Phases.

The **Realized Strategic** **Exchange**wizard consists of only one step:

truenone

##### Strategic Exchange creation

In this step, you create a new Strategic Exchangeby specifying its name, conveyed Item, and direction of a Strategic Exchange.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

You can choose one or more Conveyed Items from the list or create new ones. When creating a new Conveyed Item, choose the type depending on the viewpoint:

| Viewpoint | Conveyed Item Type |
| --- | --- |
| Strategic | Strategic Information |
| Security | Security Enclave |
| Resource Mitigation |  |
| Resources | System |
| Software |  |
| Resource Artifact |  |
| Technology |  |
| Natural Resource |  |
| Resource Service |  |
| Resource Architecture |  |
| Capability Configuration |  |
| Projects | Project |
| Personnel | Post |
|  | Responsibility |
|  | Person |
|  | Organization |
| Parameters | Geo Political Extent Type |
| Operational | Know Resource |

**Related pages**

- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x Refresh1) Working with Strategic Connectivity diagram' space='']
